sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72814" key="o)kta/metros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτά-μετρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72814.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of eight measures :</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-μετρον, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">octameter,</tr_> Sch.Heph.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0004.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.132" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.132</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
